title: RDBMS vs. Hadoop: A Comparative Architecture
description: A side-by-side visual comparison highlighting the fundamental structural, processing, and data model differences between a traditional RDBMS and the Hadoop ecosystem.
relationships: Contrasts the data handling and processing architecture of a traditional Relational Database Management System (left side) with that of the Hadoop framework (right side), demonstrating their different approaches to scalability, data structure, and computation.
